name: Tangled Undergrowth
description: Thick briars snag your boots and the canopy strangles what little light remains. Something large moves in the darkness ahead, deeper than any newcomer should wander alone. Only the south path, back the way you came, offers a certain return.
ambient_messages: A twig snaps somewhere close by, then all falls quiet.
The briars rustle as something low to the ground slinks past.
A pair of eyes glints in the darkness for a heartbeat, then vanishes.
